chart.title: Reported suicide rates
chart.subtitle: Reported annual death rate from suicide per 100,000 people. Suicide deaths are underreported in many countries due to social stigma and cultural or legal concerns. This data has not been adjusted for underreporting, and comparisons may be affected by differences in measurement.
chart.note: Reported rates are based on the [underlying cause of death](#dod:underlying-cause-of-death) listed on death certificates. To allow for comparisons between countries and over time, this metric is [age-standardized](#dod:age_standardized).

Age-standardized death rate from self-in.titleShort: Age-standardized death rate from self-inflicted injuries per 100,000 population - Sex: Both sexes - Age group: all ages
Age-standardized death rate from self-in.titleLong: Age-standardized death rate from self-inflicted injuries per 100,000 population - Sex: Both sexes - Age group: all ages
Age-standardized death rate from self-in.descriptionShort: Reported annual death rate from self-inflicted injuries per 100,000 people, based on the [underlying cause](#dod:underlying-cause-of-death) listed on death certificates. To allow for comparisons between countries and over time, this metric is [age-standardized](#dod:age_standardized).
Age-standardized death rate from self-in.citationShort: WHO Mortality Database (2025) – with minor processing by Our World in Data
Age-standardized death rate from self-in.citationLong: WHO Mortality Database (2025) – with minor processing by Our World in Data. “Age-standardized death rate from self-inflicted injuries per 100,000 population - Sex: Both sexes - Age group: all ages” [dataset].
